Why Freelanzo

Reasons Why Employers Choose Us

Everything you need to build and deploy a reliable offline workforce — all in one place.

01
🏙️

Local-Talent On-Demand

Local focus, citywide reach. Efficiently find skilled local part-time workers across Bangalore without adding to your overhead costs.

02
⚡

Rapid Hiring Turnaround

Quicker and super efficient. Share your requirements and find the perfect match within 24–48 hours for urgent needs.

03
🔄

Flexible Hiring Solutions

Efficiently deploy weekenders and part-time offline workers for immediate needs, reducing time and expense dramatically.

04
💎

Transparent Pricing

Enjoy clear, upfront pricing with no surprises. Making budgeting easier and more predictable for your business.

How It Works

Easy. Simple. Quick.

Getting started is as simple as 1, 2, 3!

🏢

For Businesses

1
Sign Up as a Business

Create your company profile in minutes — it's free to get started.

2
Get Personalised Assistance

Our dedicated executive will contact you to understand your specific requirements.

3
Post Jobs & Start Hiring

Browse pre-verified talent and hire the right offline worker within 24–48 hours.

Sign Up as Business
🎓

For Students & Job Seekers

1
Sign Up as a Job Seeker

Create your free profile and showcase your skills, experience, and availability.

2
Get Personalised Assistance

Our executive connects you with the right opportunities matching your skills.

3
Explore Day Jobs & Start Earning

Discover local day jobs near you, apply instantly, and start working and earning!

Sign Up as Job Seeker

Safety & Security

Trust. Reliability. Protection.

Your data and payments are fully secured on the Freelanzo platform.

🔒

All transactions are encrypted and protected with bank-grade security.

💳

Payment mechanism ensures safe and secure payments every time.

✅

Payment is released only when the client is 100% satisfied with the work.

🛡️

We never disclose your account information to any third-party service.
